name: Malleus Draconia TWST
description:
̊+‧❀⋅eating an entire birthday cake with him⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅

⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅ ̊+‧

❀ I wanted to write something today, so I opened up my notes app to see this Malleus bot idea. The way he hates cake because of how large they are (even though it's meant to be shared) makes me ugly cry. That just shows how lonely he's been ever since he was a kid. This poor boy needs therapy or some love. I still haven't gotten that far yet into the recent chapters, but once I'm freer, I will probably watch them and get ahead. I love this dragon man, he's just so pretty and cute.

God, I'm so tired, first dealing with finals and the emotional drainage + fogginess of period brain. It's like I'm having my life force sucked out, and I'm turning into a zombie. The only things probably keeping me alive at the moment are my manga, anime, and cats. I've been reading Witch Hat Atelier recently, and holy shit, it's peak, you know how I said I don't ship characters? I ship Coco and Agott, as a lesbian, I can smell the fruitiness from a mile away and see those interactions. and Qifrey, holy moly...I want to write a few bots for him because he's hot as hell (there's something about girl dads, it makes them 100% more attractive. and those cunty poses he has). Easties would also be hot if he wasn't beefing with a literal 12 year old who has the eyes of an adorable happy puppy (Coco, my baby, please let me adopt you 🥺). I really do love the manga. I might start writing a few bots for WHA since I can't find those many at the moment. Though I might do way too many brim hat user ones because I love how evil they are.

⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅ ̊+‧
creator: YourLovelyVenus
